'''jathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:giusto|giusto]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-th-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:giusto|giusto]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jathate|jathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jathatesher|jathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jathatesherĂ«m|jathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jathatero|jathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jathateshĂ«|jathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jathateshĂ«m|jathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijathatero|gokijathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijathateshĂ«|gokijathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijathateshĂ«m|gokijathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojathankerom|gojathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojathankeshĂ«|gojathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojathankeshĂ«m|gojathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojathankeya|gojathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jathaterom|jathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jathatemu|jathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jathateya|jathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijathaterom|gokijathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijathatemu|gokijathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijathateya|gokijathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jathathate|jathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jathathatesher|jathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jathathatesherĂ«m|jathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jathathatero|jathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jathathateshĂ«|jathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jathathateshĂ«m|jathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijathathatero|gokijathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijathathateshĂ«|gokijathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijathathateshĂ«m|gokijathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojathathankerom|gojathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojathathankeshĂ«|gojathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojathathankeshĂ«m|gojathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojathathankeya|gojathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jathathaterom|jathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jathathatemu|jathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jathathateya|jathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijathathaterom|gokijathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijathathatemu|gokijathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijathathateya|gokijathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠthĂŠte|jĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠthĂŠtesher|jĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠthĂŠtero|jĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠthĂŠtero|gokijĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠthĂŠterom|jĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠthĂŠtemu|jĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠthĂŠteya|jĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠthĂŠterom|gokijĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠthĂŠteya|gokijĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafthafte|jafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafthaftesher|jafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafthaftesherĂ«m|jafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafthaftero|jafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafthafteshĂ«|jafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafthafteshĂ«m|jafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafthaftero|gokijafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafthafteshĂ«|gokijafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafthafteshĂ«m|gokijafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafthafnkerom|gojafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafthafnkeshĂ«|gojafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafthafnkeshĂ«m|gojafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafthafnkeya|gojafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafthafterom|jafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafthaftemu|jafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafthafteya|jafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafthafterom|gokijafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafthaftemu|gokijafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafthafteya|gokijafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
